nasb.text: The children of Amram were Aaron, Moses and Miriam. And the sons of Aaron were Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar.

esv.text: The children of Amram: Aaron, Moses, and Miriam. The sons of Aaron: Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.

cnv.text: 暗蘭的兒女是亞倫、摩西和米利暗。亞倫的兒子是拿答、亞比戶、以利亞撒和以他瑪。

ccb.text: 暗兰的儿子是亚伦和摩西，女儿是米利暗。亚伦的儿子是拿答、亚比户、以利亚撒和以他玛。
